recommendations.title: How to Blow Up a Pipeline
recommendations.overview: A crew of young environmental activists execute a daring mission to sabotage an oil pipeline.

recommendations.title: My Penguin Friend
recommendations.overview: A lost penguin rescued from an oil spill transforms the life of a heartbroken fisherman. They become unlikely friends, so bonded that even the vast ocean cannot divide them.

recommendations.title: The World Is Not Enough
recommendations.overview: Greed, revenge, world dominance and high-tech terrorism – it's all in a day's work for Bond, who's on a mission to protect a beautiful oil heiress from a notorious terrorist. In a race against time that culminates in a dramatic submarine showdown, Bo

recommendations.title: The Burning Sea
recommendations.overview: An oil platform dramatically goes down on the Norwegian coast, and researchers try to find out what happened when they realize this is just the start of something even more serious.

recommendations.title: Jurassic Shark
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Thriller
recommendations.overview: When an oil company unwittingly unleashes a prehistoric shark from its icy  prison, the Jurassic killer maroons a group of art thieves and a group of  college students on an abandoned island

recommendations.title: The Last Winter
recommendations.overview: In the Arctic region of Northern Alaska, an oil company's advance team struggles to establish a drilling base that will forever alter the pristine land. After one team member is found dead, a disorientation slowly claims the sanity of the others as e

recommendations.title: Local Hero
recommendations.overview: An American oil company sends a man to Scotland to buy up an entire village where they want to build a refinery. But things don't go as expected.

recommendations.title: Killers of the Flower Moon
recommendations.overview: When oil is discovered in 1920s Oklahoma under Osage Nation land, the Osage people are murdered one by one—until the FBI steps in to unravel the mystery.

recommendations.title: There Will Be Blood
recommendations.overview: Ruthless silver miner, turned oil prospector, Daniel Plainview, moves to oil-rich California. Using his son to project a trustworthy, family-man image, Plainview cons local landowners into selling him their valuable properties for a pittance. However

recommendations.title: 22 Minutes
recommendations.overview: 22 minutes got Russian marine to free a hijacked oil tanker far from shore.
